Left Unchecked

Small Roofing Problems Become Expensive Repairs

What looks like a minor issue from the ground is often the early sign of something that spreads fast — and costs more the longer it waits.

Missing Shingles

Gaps in your roof's surface let water in, leading to leaks and hidden structural damage.

Storm Damage

Insurance claim windows are limited. Waiting to document damage can shrink or void your coverage.

Roof Aging

Older roofing systems lose their seal over time, driving up heating and cooling costs.

Water Intrusion

Once moisture gets into your attic or walls, mold and interior damage can develop within days.

Get My Free Roof Inspection
What We Do

Complete Roofing Solutions

One certified crew, every roofing need — from a single repair to a full commercial replacement.

Roof Replacement

Complete residential and commercial roof systems, built to spec and built to last.

Roof Repair

Fast, reliable repairs for asphalt, metal, flat, and tile roofing.

Storm Damage Restoration

Full insurance claim support paired with fast restoration work.

Roof Inspection

Thorough, no-obligation inspections that catch problems before they spread.

Emergency Roofing

Rapid-response service when storm or structural damage can't wait.

Gutter & Flashing

Complete drainage system protection that keeps water moving away from your home.

How It Works

Our Simple 4-Step Process

1

Free Roof Inspection

We assess your roof's condition, no cost and no obligation to move forward.

2

Detailed Assessment

You get a clear, written report of findings, materials needed, and a transparent price.

3

Project Scheduling

We lock in a start date that works around your schedule and material lead times.

4

Professional Installation

Certified crews complete the work on time, then walk the finished roof with you.

TopGuard Roofing
Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does a new roof cost?

Cost depends on roof size, material choice, and current condition. Every project starts with a free inspection so we can give you an exact, itemized quote — not a rough estimate.

Do you provide free inspections?

Yes. Every inspection is free with no obligation to book any work afterward.

Do you work with insurance companies?

Yes, our team documents damage and works directly with your adjuster to help make the claims process straightforward.

How long does roof replacement take?

Most residential replacements are completed in one to three days, depending on roof size and weather conditions.

What warranties do you offer?

We back every install with a long-term warranty covering both materials and workmanship — details are provided in your written quote.

Do you offer financing?

Yes, we offer multiple financing plans with fast approval for both residential and commercial projects.

Don't Wait Until Minor Roof Damage Becomes A Major Expense

Protect your home with a professional roof inspection from TopGuard Roofing — free, and with zero obligation.
